raw_consumer_statement: Hello, I have a credit card with citi. I haven't used the credit card in months and the card number was stolen. Puraches were made in XXXX and I live in the XXXX. All the transactions have been removed from my account accept one that is clearly a purchase made in XXXX. I had one representative tell me it would fall off and I didn't owe it. I called on the due date when the charge didn't fall off and was told I had to pay it even though it is fradualent and I was already told I didn't have to pay it.
